summary: Create valid, reliable assessments aligned to learning objectives with rubrics, scoring guides, and fairness reviews.

inputs.name: learning_objectives
inputs.description: The learning objectives the assessment should measure.

inputs.name: assessment_type
inputs.description: Type of assessment: formative, summative, performance-based, or standardized.

inputs.name: target_population
inputs.description: Learner demographics, grade level, and accommodations needed.

outputs.name: assessment_items
outputs.description: Assessment items or tasks aligned to each learning objective.

outputs.name: scoring_rubric
outputs.description: Rubric or scoring guide with clear performance level descriptors.

outputs.name: fairness_review
outputs.description: Documentation of bias, accessibility, and fairness review.

gates.rule: Confirm the task is assessment creation, not curriculum design or grading.
Require learning objectives and assessment type before item development.
Output must include assessment items, scoring rubric, and fairness review.

steps.action: Create assessment blueprint mapping objectives to item types and cognitive levels.
Write assessment items aligned to blueprint specifications.
Develop scoring rubric with clear performance level descriptors.
Verify alignment between items, objectives, and curriculum coverage.
Review items for bias, accessibility, and fairness considerations.

tools.name: filesystem.read
tools.purpose: Read learning objectives, standards, and curriculum materials.

tools.name: filesystem.write
tools.purpose: Save assessment items, rubrics, and fairness review documentation.

verification.method: Check that every objective has at least one aligned assessment item.
Check that rubric has descriptors for all criteria at all performance levels.
Check that bias and accessibility review is documented.

success_criteria: Every learning objective has at least one aligned assessment item.
Scoring rubric has clear, distinguishable descriptors at each level.
Fairness review documents bias, accessibility, and accommodation considerations.

rollback.when: If assessment items test untaught content or rubric lacks clear descriptors, discard and restart.
